stylePrefix: Kurzgesagt-style flat vector illustration, bold vibrant colors on dark background, no outlines, soft rounded shapes, layered composition with depth, educational infographic aesthetic, Duolingo-style friendly characters
compositionRules: layered depth with foreground and background elements
colorInstruction: use dark rich backgrounds like #1A1A2E or #16213E with vibrant accent colors: red #E94560, yellow #FFB703, green #53D769, blue #00BBF9, pink #F15BB5

textInImage.note: No text, words, letters, or writing of any kind in generated images
